prompt: Writing a Kotest test for my LoginViewModel in nornspun-client. I'm using Turbine to assert on uiState (a StateFlow<LoginUiState>), but awaitItem() times out even though I can see the state changing in logs. Help.

assertions.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
